dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is a momentum filter (regime rule) that prevents entry into short positions when RSI > 40, allowing strategy to remain in cash. Used rsi_14 as the standard RSI indicator. The dual moving average crossover signals referenced in entry/exit conditions are not explicitly encoded here as they would be handled by a separate primary strategy rule. Exit threshold calculated as rsi_max + 10 = 40 + 10 = 50. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal filters both long and short entries based on momentum regime. Target regime mapped to TRENDING as specified.

source_rule_text: Use a momentum/rate-of-change filter (RSI) to prevent entry into trades when momentum conditions are unfavorable, allowing the strategy to remain in cash rather than always reversing positions.
